## Type

<!-- Check one: -->
- [ ] New skill

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] `ruff check openkiln/ tests/` passes (no lint errors)
- [ ] `ruff format --check openkiln/ tests/` passes (formatting)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] SKILL.md updated (if skill changes)
- [ ] No cross-skill Python imports

<!-- For new skills: -->
- [ ] Skill validator passes
- [ ] skill.toml is complete
- [ ] Every API method has a CLI command
- [ ] Every CLI command is documented in SKILL.md
